name: Lynn Nguyen
headline: Enterprise Account Executive | Strategic SaaS & Services Partnerships
summary: Enterprise Account Executive with 10+ years of experience driving new business revenue growth, renewals, and strategic expansion across enterprise and high-growth technology customers. Proven track record managing complex, global accounts and closing large, non-standard SaaS and AI translation deals. Trusted partner to executive stakeholders with deep experience navigating ambiguity, evolving products, and consumption-based pricing models.

experience.title: Enterprise Account Executive
highlights: Manage a portfolio of strategic enterprise accounts (renewals, expansion, and long-term account strategy)
Owned new business onboarding from contract execution through launch, coordinating across sales, delivery, product, legal and finance, including with the company’s top three accounts.
Lead complex sales cycles. Closed the company’s first seven and eight-figure agreements ($30M+ in TCV).
Strategic advisor helping customers scale global content, product, and AI-translation initiatives across the org.
Structure non-standard deals including prepaid consumption, hybrid SaaS + services contracts, and AI-based offerings.
Led enterprise RFPs and complex solution sales involving platforms, integrations, APIs and managed services.
Partner with delivery teams to scope, price, and execute large-scale global programs.
Build pipeline through networking, strategic outreach, and partner channels.
Consistently exceeded quota YoY & top sales person

experience.title: Account Executive
highlights: Top salesperson three years in a row

experience.title: Director, Business Development
highlights: Promoted from Account Executive to Director based on consistent quota overachievement and enterprise deal success.

education.degree: B.A. Biology | Minor: Chemistry and Business Administration
